steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify no dependencies are blocking (task has none).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure and .gitkeep placeholders.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review existing papers in the corpus to establish the exclusion set and context.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search for ~25 patch-clamp papers on RGC/DSGC recordings and list them under Discovered Papers.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior tasks (t0002, t0004, t0012, t0014) for relevant code and context.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan.md synthesizing research outputs, asset list, and verification criteria.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute required for a literature survey.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download paper assets (one /add-paper subagent per DOI) and produce the answer asset mapping DOIs to model validation targets.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute was provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical retrieval task with no alternative-approach exploration needed.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: survey produces no quantitative comparable metrics.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write follow-up task suggestions based on survey findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalize task.json.
